descriptions.(Other): Discover unique LEGO® sets that don't fit traditional categories! This diverse collection includes experimental designs, limited releases, and special projects that showcase LEGO's creativity beyond mainstream themes. From promotional builds to one-off collaborations, these sets represent the innovative spirit of LEGO building. Perfect for collectors seeking unique additions to their collection and builders who love discovering hidden gems.
descriptions.4 Juniors: Designed for young builders transitioning from DUPLO, LEGO® 4 Juniors minifigures offer simplified building experiences with recognizable characters and themes. These sets feature easy-to-build models with larger pieces and pre-decorated elements, making construction accessible for children ages 4-7. Collect minifigures from popular themes like Batman, Spider-Man, Frozen, Toy Story, and Jurassic World, all adapted for younger hands. 4 Juniors bridges the gap between toddler building and standard LEGO sets, maintaining the creativity and play value while reducing complexity. Each minifigure comes with themed accessories and vehicles that snap together quickly, building confidence in young constructors. Perfect for preschoolers and early elementary students ready to graduate from DUPLO and begin their LEGO journey with beloved characters.
descriptions.Adventurers: LEGO® Adventurers: Johnny Thunder und Team auf Schatzsuche! Egypt (1998), Dino Island (2000), Orient Expedition (2003). Mumien, Dinosaurier und Drachen. Perfekt für Abenteurer!
descriptions.Agents: Top secret! Elite-Spione gegen Dr. Inferno's kriminelle Organisation. Agent Chase und Team mit futuristischen Gadgets und Verfolgungsjagden. Perfekt für Spion-Fans!
descriptions.Alpha Team: LEGO® Alpha Team (2001-2005): Elite-Spionage-Team gegen böse Ogel! Dash Justice, Radia und Crunch gegen Mind-Control-Plots. Sci-Fi Spionage-Action. Perfekt für Agenten-Action!
descriptions.Animal Crossing: Welcome to your island paradise with LEGO® Animal Crossing™ minifigures! Based on Nintendo's beloved life simulation game, collect villagers, special characters, and the customizable player character from this charming franchise. Build your dream island with iconic characters like Tom Nook, Isabelle, and fan-favorite animal residents. These minifigures capture the wholesome, cozy aesthetic that made Animal Crossing a global phenomenon, especially during the New Horizons era. From fishing and bug catching to decorating and fossil hunting, recreate the peaceful daily activities that define island life. With detailed accessories like furniture, tools, and seasonal items, these figures bring the game's creative customization into physical building. Perfect for fans of relaxing gameplay, cute characters, and creating your own perfect island getaway.
descriptions.Aquazone: LEGO® Aquazone (1995-1998): Unterwasser-Fraktionen kämpfen um Kristalle! Aquanauts, Aquasharks, Aquaraiders und Hydronauts mit U-Booten und Meeresbewohnern. Perfekt für Unterwasser-Action!
descriptions.Architecture: Feiern Sie architektonische Exzellenz mit LEGO® Architecture™ Minifiguren! Während sich dieses Thema hauptsächlich auf Wahrzeichen und Skylines konzentriert, repräsentieren begrenzte Minifiguren Architekten und Fachleute. Diese anspruchsvollen Figuren begleiten Sets mit weltberühmten Strukturen wie dem Eiffelturm, dem Empire State Building und dem Taj Mahal. Architecture-Minifiguren zeigen professionelle Kleidung und zeitgenössische Design-Sensibilitäten. Obwohl spärlich, fügen sie architektonischen Meisterwerken menschlichen Maßstab und Kontext hinzu. Perfekt für erwachsene Baumeister, Architektur-Enthusiasten und alle, die Design, Technik und die Gebäude schätzen, die unsere Städte und Kulturen definieren.
descriptions.Art: Transform your walls into galleries with LEGO® Art sets! These innovative building experiences let you create stunning mosaics and wall art featuring iconic subjects from pop culture, famous artwork, and beloved characters. Each set includes thousands of pieces and multiple building options, allowing you to customize your artwork. From Beatles portraits to Star Wars™ mosaics, Marvel heroes to World Maps, these sets blur the line between building and artistic expression. Display your passion on your wall with these sophisticated adult building experiences. Perfect for art lovers, collectors, and adults seeking creative relaxation through building.
descriptions.Atlantis: Dive deep! Unterwasserforscher suchen die verlorene Stadt Atlantis. Kämpfen Sie gegen Manta Warriors, Squid Warriors und den Portal Emperor. Perfekt für Unterwasser-Fans!
descriptions.Avatar: Willkommen in Pandora mit LEGO® Avatar Minifiguren! Basierend auf James Camerons bahnbrechenden Filmen (Avatar und Avatar: The Way of Water) bringen diese Figuren die Na'vi und Menschen in LEGO-Form. Entdecken Sie Na'vi-Krieger: Jake Sully (in seinem Avatar-Körper), Neytiri (Tochter des Clan-Anführers), Tsu'tey, Tonowari (Metkayina Clan-Anführer) und andere Na'vi mit ihren charakteristischen blauen Hauttönen, Gesichtsbemalung und Stammeskleidung. Die Na'vi-Figuren haben einzigartige Körperbau-Varianten, die ihre außerirdische Physiologie repräsentieren. Begegnen Sie RDA-Soldaten: Colonel Miles Quaritch, Trudy Chacon und Sky People in futuristischer militärischer Ausrüstung. Die Sets enthalten ikonische Kreaturen: Banshees (Ikran), Direhorses und Pandoras exotische Tierwelt. Mit Dschungel-Elementen, schwebenden Bergen, biolumineszenten Pflanzen und mech-Anzügen fangen die Avatar-Sets die fremde Schönheit von Pandora ein. Perfekt für Sci-Fi-Fans, Film-Enthusiasten und Alien-Welt-Entdecker!
descriptions.Avatar The Last Airbender: Master the four elements with LEGO® Avatar: The Last Airbender™ minifigures! Join Aang, Katara, Sokka, Toph, and Zuko on their journey to restore balance to the world. Collect heroes from the Water Tribe, Earth Kingdom, Fire Nation, and Air Nomads, each with unique bending abilities and cultural designs. Face villains like Fire Lord Ozai, Princess Azula, and the Dai Li. These minifigures bring to life one of animation's most beloved series with detailed expressions, costumes, and accessories. From flying bison to fire nation warships, recreate iconic moments from the show. Perfect for fans of martial arts, Eastern philosophy, and epic coming-of-age adventures.
descriptions.BIONICLE: Unite Duty, Destiny! LEGO® BIONICLE® minifigures represent a unique chapter in LEGO history. While primarily a constraction (construction-action) theme with buildable figures, BIONICLE included small minifigure-scale characters. Collect heroes like the Toa - warriors with elemental powers protecting the island of Mata Nui. Face villains like the Piraka, Barraki, and Visorak. BIONICLE featured deep mythology, Polynesian-inspired designs, and an epic storyline spanning 2001-2010. These rare minifigures complemented the larger buildable figures, offering a different scale for the rich BIONICLE universe. Perfect for fans of the legendary saga that defined 2000s LEGO with heroes, masks of power, and an unforgettable mythology.
descriptions.Baby: LEGO® Baby (1990er-2000er): Kleinkind-Spielzeug für die Jüngsten! Rassel-Steine, Plüschtiere und sichere Baby-Produkte. Teil der DUPLO-Familie. Perfekt für Kleinkinder!
descriptions.Back to the Future: Great Scott! LEGO® Back to the Future™ minifigures bring time travel adventures to life! Collect Marty McFly and Doc Brown from the classic film trilogy. These highly detailed minifigures capture the iconic looks from different time periods - 1985, 1955, 2015, and the Wild West. Available through LEGO Dimensions and LEGO Ideas sets, these figures come with the legendary DeLorean time machine. From the clock tower to the Enchantment Under the Sea dance, recreate movie moments that defined pop culture. Perfect for fans of time travel, 1980s nostalgia, and one of cinema's most beloved science fiction adventures.
descriptions.Basic: LEGO® Basic (1965-heute): Reine Bau-Steine ohne Thema! Verschiedene Farben und Größen für freies Bauen. Die Grundlage von LEGO-Kreativität. Perfekt für Puristen!
descriptions.Batman I: The Dark Knight rises with LEGO® Batman I minifigures! This early Batman theme predates the modern Super Heroes line, featuring Batman, Robin, and villains from the 1990s and early 2000s. Collect classic interpretations of the Caped Crusader alongside enemies like the Joker, the Riddler, and Mr. Freeze. These vintage minifigures showcase Batman during LEGO's initial exploration of superhero themes, with simpler designs compared to today's highly detailed figures. From the Batcave to Gotham City streets, these sets captured Batman's world during a formative era. Though less detailed than modern versions, Batman I minifigures represent important LEGO history and the beginning of superhero building. Perfect for nostalgic collectors who remember when Batman first came to LEGO and fans of vintage minifigure designs.
descriptions.Belville: LEGO® Belville (1994-2009): LEGO-Linie für Mädchen mit Puppen-ähnlichen Figuren! Märchen-Prinzessinnen, Pferde, Paläste und Freundschafts-Geschichten. Größere Figuren. Perfekt für junge Baumeisterinnen!
descriptions.Ben 10: It's hero time with LEGO® Ben 10™ sets! Based on Cartoon Network's action-packed series, build alien transformations, vehicles, and battle scenes from Ben Tennyson's adventures. These sets capture the excitement of the Omnitrix and Ben's alien forms as he fights villains and saves the world. Though a brief theme, Ben 10 sets delivered action-packed building for fans of the animated series. Perfect for young fans of the show who love aliens, action, and superhero adventures.
descriptions.Bluey: It's playtime with LEGO® Bluey™! Based on the Australian animated sensation, collect Bluey, Bingo, Bandit, and Chilli from the beloved children's series. These minifigures capture the heart and humor of the Heeler family's imaginative games and everyday adventures. Build the Heeler house, go on camping trips, and recreate episodes that resonate with families worldwide. From Keepy Uppy to Dance Mode, these figures celebrate play, parenting, and family bonds. DUPLO and standard LEGO sets bring Bluey's world to life for young builders. Perfect for families who love the show's warmth, creativity, and celebration of childhood imagination.
descriptions.Boat: Set sail with LEGO® Boat sets! This classic category features vessels of all kinds - from small sailboats and speedboats to massive cargo ships and cruise liners. These sets focus on nautical building with hulls, sails, motors, and maritime details. Whether building harbor scenes or ocean adventures, Boat sets celebrate humanity's relationship with water. Perfect for builders who love maritime themes, sailing, and nautical engineering.
descriptions.Boost: Program, build, and play with LEGO® Boost! This innovative system combines building with coding, allowing creators to construct five different models that come to life through app-controlled programming. Build a robot, a cat, a guitar, a rover, or an AutoBuilder, then use the intuitive drag-and-drop coding interface to make them move, play music, and react to their environment. With motors, sensors, and hundreds of building possibilities, Boost bridges physical and digital play. Perfect for children learning coding, parents seeking educational STEM toys, and families who want to build and program together.
descriptions.Botanicals: Holen Sie die Natur nach drinnen mit LEGO® Botanicals! Dieses auf Erwachsene ausgerichtete Thema bietet realistische Blumen, Pflanzen und botanische Displays, die niemals gegossen werden müssen. Von kunstvollen Blumensträußen und Bonsai-Bäumen bis zu Trockenblumen und Sukkulenten dienen diese anspruchsvollen Bauten als permanente Heimdekoration. Jede botanische Kreation erfasst die Schönheit und Details echter Pflanzen und hält dabei für immer. Bauen Sie achtsam, präsentieren Sie stolz und genießen Sie den meditativen Prozess, die Schönheit der Natur Stein für Stein zu konstruieren. Perfekt für Pflanzenliebhaber, Heimdekorateure und Erwachsene, die kreative Entspannung durch schöne Bauprojekte suchen.
descriptions.Braille Bricks: Learn through touch with LEGO® Braille Bricks! This innovative educational initiative teaches braille to blind and visually impaired children through play. Each brick features studs corresponding to braille letters and numbers, with printed letters for sighted teachers and peers to learn alongside. Braille Bricks transform literacy learning into tactile, engaging play, promoting inclusive education. Though primarily distributed through educational partners rather than retail, these sets represent LEGO's commitment to accessibility. Perfect for educators teaching braille, families with visually impaired children, and promoting inclusive learning.
descriptions.Brick Sketches: Create iconic portraits with LEGO® Brick Sketches! These mosaic-style sets let you build flat, stylized portraits of beloved characters from Star Wars™, Marvel, DC, and more. Mounted on decorative frames with nameplates, Brick Sketches serve as artistic wall décor celebrating pop culture icons. With bold colors and simplified designs, these sets offer quick, satisfying builds that look impressive on display. Perfect for fans who want character art, collectors seeking affordable display pieces, and builders who love mosaic-style construction.
descriptions.BrickHeadz: Build iconic characters in LEGO® BrickHeadz style! These collectible construction characters feature oversized heads, compact bodies, and instantly recognizable designs. From superheroes and movie characters to seasonal figures and pets, BrickHeadz transform beloved characters into adorable, stylized builds. Each figure stands on a baseplate for display, creating a uniform collection aesthetic. With hundreds of characters released since 2016, BrickHeadz combine building satisfaction with collectible appeal. Perfect for character collectors, desk decorators, and builders who love cute, displayable models.
descriptions.BrickLink: Discover fan-designed excellence with LEGO® BrickLink sets! This category encompasses community-created designs that become official LEGO products. Similar to LEGO Ideas but with different selection processes, BrickLink sets showcase the incredible creativity of adult fans. From detailed medieval buildings to nostalgic classic space tributes, these sets represent the LEGO community's passion and skill. Perfect for adult builders, collectors supporting fan designers, and those seeking unique sets created by fellow enthusiasts.
descriptions.BrickLink Designer Program: BrickLink Designer Program sind von Fans designte Sets, die durch Community-Voting produziert werden. Exklusive Fan-Designs nur auf BrickLink. Perfekt für Crowdsourced-Kreativität!
descriptions.Build Together: Share the joy of building with LEGO® Build Together sets! This initiative promotes collaborative building experiences for families, classrooms, and communities. Sets in this category encourage teamwork, communication, and shared creativity through building activities designed for multiple participants. Perfect for families seeking quality time together, educators promoting collaborative learning, and community programs using LEGO as a team-building tool.
descriptions.Building Bigger Thinking: Inspire young minds with LEGO® Building Bigger Thinking minifigures! This educational initiative promotes creativity, problem-solving, and STEM learning through building. These minifigures accompany sets designed to encourage experimentation and innovative thinking in children. Rather than following strict instructions, Building Bigger Thinking emphasizes open-ended construction and learning through play. Figures represent diverse professions and backgrounds, inspiring children to see themselves as builders and creators. This theme bridges entertainment and education, making learning fun through hands-on brick building. With focus on critical thinking skills and creative confidence, these sets prepare children for future challenges. Perfect for parents and educators who value learning through play and want to develop children's problem-solving abilities through engaging LEGO experiences.
descriptions.Building Event: Celebrate special LEGO® Building Events! These sets commemorate conventions, store openings, building competitions, and community gatherings. Often limited and exclusive, Building Event sets mark memorable occasions in LEGO community history. From convention exclusives to celebration builds, these sets capture the spirit of LEGO community events. Perfect for event attendees, collectors of exclusive releases, and fans who cherish LEGO community memories.
descriptions.Building Set with People: Classic LEGO® sets featuring people and everyday life! This vintage category from LEGO's early decades included simple buildings and figures representing community life. Before specialized themes emerged, these sets taught building fundamentals through relatable scenes. Historical treasures from LEGO's formative years, these sets show the origins of minifigure play and community building. Perfect for vintage LEGO collectors, historians of toy design, and nostalgic builders remembering LEGO's simpler era.
descriptions.Bulk Bricks: LEGO® Bulk Bricks: Große Mengen von Basis-Steinen! Eimer und Boxen mit hunderten Steinen für Massen-Bauen. Wert-orientierte Sets. Perfekt für MOC-Builder!
descriptions.Cars: Start your engines with LEGO® Cars™ minifigures! Based on Pixar's animated films Cars, Cars 2, and Cars 3, collect Lightning McQueen, Mater, Sally, Doc Hudson, and the entire Radiator Springs crew. While primarily brick-built car models, some sets include humanoid pit crew and race official minifigures. These figures complement the racing action and bring the Piston Cup excitement to life. From international espionage in Cars 2 to next-gen racing in Cars 3, recreate movie moments and race adventures. Perfect for young Pixar fans who love racing, friendship, and the heartwarming story of a race car learning what truly matters.
descriptions.Castle: Betreten Sie das mittelalterliche Königreich mit LEGO® Castle Minifiguren! Von 1978 bis heute hat Castle ikonische Ritter, tapfere Könige, furchterregende Drachen und mystische Zauberer hervorgebracht. Entdecken Sie die klassischen Fraktionen: die Königlichen Ritter (Classic Castle, Lion Knights, Royal Knights), die bösen Black Knights, die Forestmen (Robin Hood-inspirierten Outlaws), die Fright Knights mit untoten Kriegern und die Fantasy Era mit Trollen und Skelettarmeen. Jede Ära bringt einzigartige Wappen, Rüstungen und Waffen mit sich – von einfachen 1980er Helmen bis zu detaillierten 2010er Prints. Sammeln Sie legendäre Könige, mutige Ritter, geheimnisvolle Zauberer, furchtlose Prinzessinnen und gefährliche Drachenkrieger. Mit Schwertern, Schilden, Bannern und Pferden können Sie epische Burgen bauen und mittelalterliche Schlachten nachstellen. Perfekt für Fantasy-Fans, Mittelalter-Enthusiasten und Nostalgie-Sammler!
descriptions.Cities of Wonders: Explore architectural marvels with LEGO® Cities of Wonders! Though a limited theme, these sets featured famous landmarks and impressive architectural achievements from around the world. Combining building challenges with cultural appreciation, Cities of Wonders sets celebrated human architectural achievement through brick-built models. Perfect for travel enthusiasts, architecture fans, and builders who love recreating world-famous structures.
descriptions.City: Experience everyday adventures with LEGO® City minifigures! From brave firefighters and police officers to astronauts and construction workers, LEGO City captures the excitement of real-world jobs and adventures. Collect coast guard rescue teams, emergency responders, pizza delivery drivers, and everyone in between. Our City collection features minifigures representing diverse careers and lifestyles, from bustling downtown workers to mountain rescue teams and deep-sea explorers. With over four decades of iconic designs, LEGO City minifigures let builders of all ages create their own modern metropolis. Whether you're fighting fires, solving crimes, or exploring the Arctic, these minifigures bring the excitement of urban life and adventure to your collection.
descriptions.Classic: Wo LEGO®-Geschichte lebendig wird! LEGO® Classic Minifiguren repräsentieren die zeitlosen, generationsübergreifenden Sets, die reine Kreativität und freies Bauen feiern. Von den einfachen 1980er Smiling Minifigs bis zu modernen Classic-Wiederbelebungen umfasst diese Kollektion die ikonischsten generischen Charaktere: klassische Stadtbewohner, Bauarbeiter, Feuerwehrleute, Polizisten, Ärzte und Alltagshelden. Diese Sets sind nicht an spezifische Themen oder Lizenzen gebunden – sie sind die Grundlage für unendliche Kreativität. Entdecken Sie die einfachen gelben Köpfe mit lächelnden Gesichtern, die grundlegenden Outfits in leuchtenden Primärfarben und die zeitlosen Accessoires. Classic-Sets enthalten oft vielfältige Charakter-Packs, die Kinder und Erwachsene ermutigen, ihre eigenen Geschichten zu erfinden. Von Retro-Wiederbelebungen bis zu modernen Creative-Baukästen ist Classic das Herz von LEGO. Perfekt für Puristen, Nostalgiker und Baumeister aller Altersgruppen!
descriptions.Clikits: LEGO® Clikits (2003-2006): Schmuck- und Accessoire-Bastelsets für Mädchen! Armbänder, Schlüsselanhänger, Bilderrahmen mit Klick-Verbindungen. Nicht-Brick LEGO. Perfekt für Crafting!
descriptions.Collectible Minifigures: Die legendäre Blind-Bag-Serie seit 2010! LEGO® Collectible Minifigures (CMF) sind limitierte Minifigur-Serien, die in mysteriösen versiegelten Beuteln verkauft werden – sammeln Sie sie alle! Mit über 800 einzigartigen Charakteren aus 24+ Haupt-Serien (Series 1-24+) plus Spezialserien (Simpsons, Disney, Harry Potter, Marvel Studios, Looney Tunes) ist CMF die ultimative Sammlererfahrung. Entdecken Sie kreative Original-Charaktere: Caveman, Roman Soldier, Mermaid, DJ, Banana Guy, Chicken Suit Guy, Giraffe Guy und Hunderte mehr. Jede Serie enthält 12-22 Figuren mit einzigartigen Accessoires, detaillierten Prints und oft exklusiven Form-Elementen. Das Blind-Bag-Format macht jedes Öffnen zu einer Überraschung! Von klassischen Berufen bis zu absurden Kostümen, von historischen Figuren bis zu Fantasy-Kreaturen – CMF feiert Kreativität. Perfekt für Sammler, Blind-Bag-Fans und Minifigur-Enthusiasten!
descriptions.Collectibles: Discover exclusive LEGO® Collectibles! This category includes special releases, anniversary sets, promotional items, and limited editions designed primarily for collecting rather than play. From commemorative minifigures to special packaging variants, Collectibles celebrate LEGO history and culture. These sets often appreciate in value and become treasured pieces in collections. Perfect for serious collectors, LEGO historians, and fans seeking rare and exclusive items.
descriptions.Creator: Entfesseln Sie unbegrenzte Kreativität mit LEGO® Creator Minifiguren! Dieses vielseitige Thema ermutigt Baumeister, alles zu erschaffen, was sie sich vorstellen können, von Gebäuden und Fahrzeugen bis zu Kreaturen und Fantasy-Welten. Creator-Minifiguren spiegeln diese Vielseitigkeit wider und umfassen Piloten, Abenteurer, Surfer, Rennfahrer und alltägliche Menschen. Mit 3-in-1-Sets, die mehrere Bauoptionen bieten, können diese Figuren in einem Moment Astronauten und im nächsten Dschungel-Forscher sein. Die Creator-Linie feiert Vorstellungskraft ohne Grenzen und gibt Baumeistern die Freiheit, jede Geschichte zu erzählen. Perfekt für Baumeister, die Flexibilität lieben und Minifiguren möchten, die zu jedem Abenteuer passen, das sie sich erträumen können.
descriptions.Crocs: Personalize your Crocs with LEGO® Crocs collaboration sets! These unique accessories feature LEGO brick-themed Jibbitz charms that attach to Crocs shoes. Combining two iconic brands, these sets let you customize footwear with colorful brick designs. Though limited, this collaboration showcased LEGO's expansion beyond traditional building into fashion accessories. Perfect for Crocs enthusiasts, LEGO fans wanting branded merchandise, and those who love unique fashion collaborations.
descriptions.DC Super Hero Girls: Girl power saves the day with LEGO® DC Super Hero Girls™ minifigures! Based on the animated series, collect teenage versions of Wonder Woman, Supergirl, Batgirl, Bumblebee, Poison Ivy, and Harley Quinn as they balance high school life with superhero training. These mini-doll figures feature colorful costumes, unique hairstyles, and superhero accessories. From Superhero High School to villain battles, these sets celebrate friendship, empowerment, and finding your inner hero. DC Super Hero Girls reimagines classic DC characters for a younger audience, emphasizing teamwork and self-confidence. With vehicles, headquarters, and school settings, recreate adventures from the animated universe. Perfect for young fans who love superheroes, strong female characters, and stories about friendship, courage, and being yourself.
descriptions.DREAMZzz: Dream bigger with LEGO® DREAMZzz™ minifigures! This imaginative theme brings the dream world to life where anything is possible. Follow Mateo, Izzie, Cooper, Logan, and Zoey as they enter the dream realm and face off against the Nightmare King and his dark forces. These minifigures feature unique designs that transform between real world and dream world versions, encouraging creative storytelling. Build fantastical creatures, impossible vehicles, and surreal environments limited only by imagination. With story-driven building and multiple build options, DREAMZzz celebrates creativity and the power of dreams. Perfect for young builders who love fantasy, friendship, and thinking outside the box.
descriptions.DUPLO: Große Steine für kleine Hände! LEGO® DUPLO Figuren (keine klassischen Minifiguren) sind für Kleinkinder (1,5-5 Jahre) konzipiert und doppelt so groß wie normale LEGO-Elemente. Die DUPLO-Figuren haben einen einzigartigen Körperstil: abgerundete Köpfe, einteilige Torsos und keine beweglichen Arme – perfekt für kleine Kinder. Entdecken Sie freundliche Charaktere: Bauernfamilien, Zookeeper, Feuerwehrleute, Ärzte, Tierärzte und Alltagshelden. DUPLO umfasst auch lizenzierte Charaktere: Mickey Mouse, Minnie, Winnie the Pooh, Spider-Man und Disney-Prinzessinnen in kindersicheren Versionen. Jede Figur ist robust, waschbar und sicher für Kinder, die noch alles in den Mund stecken. DUPLO-Sets fördern frühes Lernen: Zahlen, Buchstaben, Farben, Tiere und soziale Situationen. Von Bauernhöfen über Feuerwehrstationen bis zu Stadthäusern bietet DUPLO sichere erste LEGO-Erfahrungen. Perfekt für Kleinkinder, Vorschulkinder und erste LEGO-Abenteurer!
descriptions.Designer Sets: Experience advanced building with LEGO® Designer Sets! This premium line featured complex models with sophisticated techniques, targeting experienced builders. Designer Sets pushed boundaries with architectural models, mechanical functions, and innovative building methods. Representing LEGO at its most challenging, these sets demanded patience and skill while delivering impressive display models. Perfect for master builders, adult enthusiasts seeking challenges, and collectors of premium LEGO experiences.
descriptions.Despicable Me and Minions: Banana! LEGO® Despicable Me and Minions™ figures bring Illumination's hilarious characters to brick form! Collect Gru, his adorable daughters Margo, Edith, and Agnes, plus the lovable Minions like Kevin, Stuart, and Bob. These figures capture the humor and heart of the Despicable Me franchise with distinctive designs and accessories. From Gru's Laborator to the Minions' chaotic antics, recreate movie moments and create new adventures. The Minions' gibberish language and silly behavior translate perfectly into creative LEGO play. With vehicles, weapons, and plenty of bananas, these sets deliver family-friendly comedy and action. Perfect for fans of the movies who love the Minions' infectious energy, Gru's transformation from villain to dad, and heartwarming stories about unconventional families.
descriptions.Dimensions: Break the boundaries between worlds with LEGO® Dimensions minifigures! This groundbreaking toys-to-life video game brought together characters from across pop culture universes. Collect Batman, Gandalf, Wyldstyle, Sonic the Hedgehog, Homer Simpson, Scooby-Doo, and dozens of other iconic characters - all meeting in one game. Each minifigure came with unique abilities and vehicles that transported between digital and physical play. While the game ended in 2017, these crossover minifigures remain beloved for bringing together franchises that would never normally meet. A unique moment in LEGO history where anything was possible and every character could be friends.
descriptions.Dino: Prehistoric danger! Elite-Jäger fangen aggressive Dinosaurier: T-Rex, Raptoren, Pteranodons. Moderne Militär-Ausrüstung trifft prähistorische Gefahr. Perfekt für Dino-Fans!
descriptions.Dino 2010: Hunt dinosaurs with LEGO® Dino 2010! The European version of Dino Attack, this theme featured modern explorers tracking prehistoric creatures with advanced technology. Sets included off-road vehicles, research stations, and encounters with T-Rex, Triceratops, and other dinosaurs. With lime green and orange color schemes, Dino 2010 delivered action-packed dinosaur adventures. Perfect for dinosaur fans, vehicle builders, and collectors of LEGO's dinosaur-themed history.
descriptions.Dino Attack: Mutant dinosaurs threaten humanity in LEGO® Dino Attack™ minifigures! This apocalyptic 2005 theme (Dino 2010 in Europe) featured military teams battling mutant reptiles with futuristic weapons and vehicles. Collect soldiers in distinctive black, orange, and lime green uniforms with advanced armaments. These minifigures fought genetically altered dinosaurs in post-apocalyptic settings. Darker and more militaristic than typical LEGO themes, Dino Attack delivered intense action and sci-fi horror elements. Though controversial for its aggressive tone, it remains memorable for fans of military sci-fi and dinosaur action. Perfect for collectors who appreciate unique, darker LEGO themes with end-of-the-world stakes.
descriptions.Dinosaurs: Roar into prehistoric times with LEGO® Dinosaurs! This vintage theme featured buildable dinosaur models before minifigures became standard. From T-Rex to Brontosaurus, these sets let builders construct impressive reptiles for display and play. Representing LEGO's early exploration of prehistoric themes, Dinosaur sets capture nostalgia for simpler building eras. Perfect for dinosaur enthusiasts, vintage LEGO collectors, and paleontology fans.
descriptions.Discovery: LEGO® Discovery (2003-2004): Bildungs-Sets mit echten NASA-Partnerschaften! Space Shuttle, Mars Rover, Dinosaurier-Skelette. LEGO trifft Wissenschaft. Perfekt für STEM-Lernen!
descriptions.Disney: Betreten Sie die magische Welt von Disney™ mit LEGO® Disney Minifiguren! Sammeln Sie geliebte Prinzessinnen wie Elsa, Anna, Ariel, Belle und Cinderella, zusammen mit klassischen Charakteren wie Mickey Mouse, Minnie Mouse, Donald Duck und Goofy. Unsere Disney-Kollektion umfasst Generationen des Geschichtenerzählens, von zeitlosen Klassikern bis zu modernen Favoriten wie Moana, Raya und Charakteren aus Encanto. Bauen Sie Märchenschlösser mit Frozen-Charakteren, segeln Sie die Meere mit Moana, oder erschaffen Sie magische Momente mit Disney-Prinzessinnen. Diese Minifiguren erfassen den Charme, die Magie und das Wunder, die Disney einem weltweiten Publikum bringt. Perfekt für junge Baumeister und Disney-Fans, die ihre eigenen Happy Ends erschaffen möchten.
descriptions.Dots: LEGO® Dots sind kreative Schmuck- und Deko-Sets zum Gestalten: Armbänder, Bilderrahmen, Aufbewahrungsboxen mit bunten Tiles. Endlos anpassbar. Perfekt für Design-Fans!
descriptions.Dune: The spice must flow with LEGO® Dune™ minifigures! Based on Frank Herbert's legendary science fiction epic and Denis Villeneuve's cinematic adaptation, collect characters from the desert planet Arrakis. Build Paul Atreides, Lady Jessica, Duke Leto, Chani, Stilgar, and the ruthless Baron Harkonnen. These minifigures capture the intricate costumes, stillsuits, and desert aesthetic of this complex universe. From ornithopters to sandworm encounters, recreate the political intrigue and desert warfare that define Dune. With detailed printing and accessories representing Fremen culture and noble houses, these figures honor one of science fiction's most influential works. Perfect for fans of epic science fiction, political drama, environmental themes, and the sprawling saga that inspired generations of sci-fi storytelling.
descriptions.Editions: Discover exclusive treasures with LEGO® Editions minifigures! This category encompasses special releases, limited editions, and exclusive promotional figures not available through regular retail. From store grand openings to convention exclusives and employee gifts, Editions minifigures are among the rarest in LEGO collecting. These figures often feature unique printing, colors, or characters unavailable elsewhere. Some celebrate LEGO milestones, anniversaries, or partnerships with special organizations. Editions figures command premium prices in the secondary market due to their scarcity. From chrome-plated promotional figures to event-specific characters, each tells a story about LEGO's history and special occasions. Perfect for serious collectors pursuing rare figures, completists hunting elusive pieces, and fans who love the story behind exclusive LEGO releases.
descriptions.Education: LEGO® Education bietet Lernwerkzeuge für Schulen: WeDo, Spike Prime, Mindstorms Education. MINT-Lehrpläne mit hands-on Lernen. Perfekt für Pädagogen!
descriptions.Educational & Dacta: Build knowledge with LEGO® Educational & Dacta minifigures! Dacta (now LEGO Education) provided educational LEGO products to schools and institutions since the 1970s. These specialized sets included diverse minifigures representing community members, workers, families, and children from various backgrounds. Educational & Dacta figures teach social concepts, cultural awareness, and community roles through play-based learning. From hospital workers to public service employees, these figures help children understand their world. Sets emphasized realistic scenarios over fantasy, supporting curriculum objectives. With focus on diversity and representation, Dacta pioneered inclusive toys decades ago. Though the Dacta name evolved into LEGO Education, these vintage educational figures remain valued by collectors and educators. Perfect for those who appreciate LEGO's educational heritage and commitment to learning through play.
descriptions.Elves: Betreten Sie die magische Welt von Elvendale mit LEGO® Elves Minifiguren! Dieses Fantasy-Thema (2015-2018) folgt Emily Jones, einem Mädchen aus der menschlichen Welt, das in ein Reich voller Elfen, Drachen und Magie transportiert wird. Treffen Sie die vier Elemental-Elfen: Naida Riverheart (Wasser-Elf), Azari Firedancer (Feuer-Elf), Farran Leafshade (Erd-Elf) und Aira Windwhistler (Luft-Elf). Jede Elfin hat einzigartige magische Kräfte, aufwendige Kleider mit detaillierten Prints und charakteristische Accessoires. Begegnen Sie mystischen Kreaturen: freundliche Drachen (Baby-Drachen, Element-Drachen), sprechende Tiere und magische Wesen. Die Schurkin Ragana und ihre Goblin-Armee bedrohen Elvendale mit dunkler Magie. Elves-Sets enthalten atemberaubende Locations: Skyra's Mysterious Sky Castle, Ragana's Magic Shadow Castle, das Elvenstar Tree House und mehr. Die Figuren haben oft besondere Haare, Flügel und Zauberstäbe. Perfekt für Fantasy-Fans, Drachen-Liebhaber und magische Abenteurer!
descriptions.Exo-Force: Pilot giant mechs with LEGO® Exo-Force™ minifigures! This anime-inspired theme (2006-2008) featured young pilots defending Sentai Mountain from evil robots. Collect heroes like Hikaru, Takeshi, Ryo, and Ha-Ya-To alongside villain Meca One and robot forces. These minifigures featured manga-style designs with distinctive hair and Japanese-influenced aesthetics. From battling machines to hovering fortresses, Exo-Force combined mecha anime with LEGO building. Each figure piloted customizable battle machines in a continuing storyline. Though short-lived, Exo-Force remains beloved by fans of anime, robots, and the unique fusion of LEGO with Japanese pop culture.
descriptions.Explore: LEGO® Explore (2002-2004): DUPLO-Unterkategorie für Vorschulkinder! Lern-Sets mit Zahlen, Buchstaben, Tieren. Spielerisches Lernen. Perfekt für Vorschüler!
descriptions.Explorer: Venture into the unknown with LEGO® Explorer sets! This adventure-focused category featured expeditions, discoveries, and journey-themed builds. From jungle exploration to desert adventures, Explorer sets celebrated human curiosity and discovery. Perfect for adventurous builders, travel enthusiasts, and children who dream of exploration.
descriptions.FIRST LEGO League: Compete and innovate with FIRST LEGO® League minifigures! This global robotics competition challenges students to build robots using LEGO components while researching real-world problems. Limited minifigures related to each season's challenge theme accompany competition materials. From ocean exploration to space missions, each year's figures reflect that season's research topic. FIRST LEGO League combines LEGO building with programming, engineering, and teamwork. These exclusive figures represent the competition's emphasis on innovation and problem-solving. Participants receive recognition through trophies, patches, and sometimes special minifigures. This program inspires the next generation of engineers and scientists through hands-on STEM challenges. Perfect for students passionate about robotics, educators supporting STEM education, and families encouraging technical skills through competitive building.
descriptions.FORMA: Create kinetic art with LEGO® FORMA! This innovative adult line featured organic, flowing designs with customizable skins. Build mechanical fish that undulate gracefully, combining engineering with artistic expression. FORMA represented LEGO's experimental approach to adult building, blending function with aesthetics. Though discontinued, FORMA showcased LEGO's willingness to explore new creative territories. Perfect for adult builders seeking unique experiences, kinetic art enthusiasts, and collectors of experimental LEGO lines.
descriptions.Fabuland: LEGO® Fabuland (1979-1989): Anthropomorphe Tier-Charaktere für Vorschulkinder! Edward Elephant, Bonnie Bunny, Max Mouse in vereinfachten Stadt-Szenarien. Retro-Kindheit. Perfekt für Nostalgie!
descriptions.Factory: Design your own sets with LEGO® Factory! This revolutionary service let fans create custom models using LEGO Digital Designer software, then order the exact pieces to build their designs. Factory democratized LEGO design, giving builders tools previously reserved for LEGO designers. Though the service ended, Factory inspired LEGO Ideas and community design programs. Perfect for nostalgic remembrance of LEGO's digital innovation and the origins of community-designed sets.
descriptions.Fortnite: Drop into the Battle Royale with LEGO® Fortnite™ minifigures! Based on the global gaming phenomenon, collect iconic skins and characters from Fortnite's ever-evolving world. From default skins to legendary outfits, these minifigures capture the game's distinctive art style and personality. Build Battle Bus encounters, construct defense structures, and recreate Victory Royales with detailed figures featuring back bling, pickaxes, and weapons. Whether you're a pro player or casual fan, these minifigures bring Fortnite's colorful chaos from screen to brick. Perfect for gamers who love building, battling, and expressing their unique style through cosmetic customization.
descriptions.FreeStyle: Express unlimited creativity with LEGO® FreeStyle minifigures! This theme from the 1990s and early 2000s emphasized open-ended building without specific models or instructions. FreeStyle sets contained basic bricks, wheels, windows, and simple minifigures for whatever builders could imagine. These generic figures could become anyone - astronauts, drivers, adventurers, or everyday people. FreeStyle represented pure LEGO philosophy: providing pieces and letting creativity determine the outcome. With bright colors and versatile elements, these sets encouraged experimentation. Though simple compared to modern minifigures, FreeStyle figures sparked countless stories and creations. This theme trusted builders to invent their own adventures without prescribed narratives. Perfect for nostalgic builders who remember when LEGO meant a bucket of bricks and infinite possibilities limited only by imagination.
descriptions.Friends: Welcome to Heartlake City with LEGO® Friends minifigures! Follow the adventures of Andrea, Emma, Mia, Olivia, and Stephanie as they navigate friendship, creativity, and fun in their vibrant community. From beach days and camping trips to music performances and pet rescues, these mini-dolls capture every moment of friendship and adventure. Our Friends collection has evolved over the years, introducing new characters and celebrating diversity, ensuring every builder can see themselves in Heartlake City. Whether you're building the perfect treehouse, running a café, or caring for animals at the rescue center, LEGO Friends minifigures bring stories of kindness, creativity, and friendship to life.
descriptions.Friends TV Series: Could these BE any more awesome? LEGO® Friends TV Series minifigures bring the beloved sitcom to brick form! Collect all six friends - Ross, Rachel, Monica, Chandler, Joey, and Phoebe - with iconic outfits and accessories from the show. Build Central Perk with the orange couch where countless conversations happened, or recreate Monica and Rachel's apartment. These minifigures capture the distinctive looks and personalities that made Friends a cultural phenomenon. From Ross's dinosaur passion to Joey's pizza love, detailed accessories reference classic episodes. With Central Perk's coffee cups and the apartment's details, relive favorite moments from all ten seasons. Perfect for fans who grew up watching Friends, nostalgia lovers, and anyone who understands these references without explanation.
descriptions.Fusion: Merge physical and digital with LEGO® Fusion minifigures! This innovative 2014-2015 theme combined physical LEGO building with mobile gaming. Build creations on special baseplates, scan them with a smartphone, and watch them appear in companion apps. Fusion included Town Master (city building), Battle Towers (defense game), Resort Designer (hotel management), and Create & Race (vehicle racing). Minifigures interacted between physical and digital worlds, representing LEGO's experimentation with connected play. Though short-lived, Fusion pioneered augmented reality before it became mainstream. These figures represented characters that existed simultaneously as physical toys and digital game elements. Perfect for collectors of discontinued themes who appreciate LEGO's innovation in blending traditional building with modern gaming technology.
descriptions.Gabby's Dollhouse: Come inside with LEGO® Gabby's Dollhouse™! Based on the DreamWorks animated series, shrink down to kitty size with Gabby and her cat friends. Collect Gabby, Pandy Paws, Cakey Cat, MerCat, DJ Catnip, and all the adorable characters from the show's colorful rooms. These DUPLO and standard LEGO figures bring preschool creativity and kindness to life. Build themed rooms, solve problems with kindness, and celebrate imagination. Perfect for young builders who love the show's positive messages, cute cats, and the magic of creative play in a dollhouse world where anything is possible.
descriptions.Galidor: Battle in the Outer Dimension with LEGO® Galidor! Based on the 2002 television series, Galidor featured buildable action figures with interchangeable body parts. This experimental theme blended building with action figure play, allowing characters to swap limbs and abilities. Though short-lived, Galidor represented LEGO's bold experimentation beyond traditional building. Perfect for collectors of discontinued themes, fans of early 2000s LEGO innovation, and those who remember this unique attempt at action figure building.
descriptions.Games: Roll the dice with LEGO® Games minifigures! This unique theme (2009-2013) transformed LEGO into playable board games. Build your own game boards using LEGO bricks, then play with included rules and custom microfigures. These specialized miniature figures (smaller than standard minifigures) represented game tokens and characters. From Pirate Plank to Minotaurus, from racing games to strategy battles, LEGO Games delivered customizable gameplay. Players could modify rules and boards, making each game session unique. While microfigures differ from traditional minifigures, they introduced innovative character designs. Games represented LEGO expanding beyond building into interactive entertainment. Perfect for board game fans who love customization and anyone who appreciates LEGO's creative approach to traditional tabletop gaming.
descriptions.Ghostbusters: Who you gonna call? LEGO® Ghostbusters™ minifigures! Capture spooks and specters with Peter Venkman, Ray Stantz, Egon Spengler, and Winston Zeddemore. These highly detailed figures feature the iconic tan jumpsuits, proton packs, and ghost-catching equipment from the classic 1984 film and its sequels. Collect supporting characters like Janine Melnitz and face off against ghosts, including the unforgettable Stay Puft Marshmallow Man. From the Ecto-1 to the firehouse headquarters, recreate paranormal investigations and supernatural showdowns. Perfect for fans of the beloved comedy franchise who ain't afraid of no ghost and want to build the ultimate ghost-busting team.
descriptions.Harry Potter: Step into the magical world of Harry Potter™ with LEGO® minifigures that bring Hogwarts™ to life. Collect Harry, Ron, and Hermione throughout their years at school, from first-year students to battle-ready wizards. Build your collection with iconic professors like Dumbledore, McGonagall, and Snape, or add dark wizards like Voldemort and the Death Eaters. Our Harry Potter minifigures feature beloved characters from all eight films, including fan favorites like Dobby, Hagrid, Luna Lovegood, and Neville Longbottom. From Quidditch players in their house robes to Triwizard Tournament champions, each minifigure captures the magic and detail that makes the wizarding world so enchanting. Perfect for fans of all ages who want to recreate their favorite scenes or create new magical adventures.
descriptions.Hero Factory: Build a Hero with LEGO® Hero Factory™ minifigures! This constraction theme (2010-2014) succeeded BIONICLE with buildable action figures. Hero Factory featured robots assembled in a factory to protect the galaxy from villains. While primarily buildable figures, some sets included traditional minifigure-scale characters. Heroes like Stormer, Furno, Bulk, and Breez battled villains like Von Nebula and the Brains. Each hero specialized in different skills and equipment, upgradeable through the storyline. Hero Factory delivered sci-fi action with a factory production theme, emphasizing customization and combination builds. Though shorter-lived than BIONICLE, it developed a loyal following. Perfect for fans of buildable action figures, robot heroes, and the sci-fi universe where heroes are manufactured to protect civilization.
descriptions.Hidden Side: See the unseen! Augmented Reality Geisterjagd! Jack und Parker bekämpfen Lady E mit Smartphone-App. Scan LEGO-Sets und jagen Sie digitale Geister! Perfekt für Tech-Fans!
descriptions.Hobby Sets: Explore specialized interests with LEGO® Hobby Sets! This vintage category included builds focused on specific hobbies, interests, and activities. From classic cars to aircraft, Hobby Sets let builders recreate their passions in LEGO form. Representing LEGO's early diversification, these sets targeted specific interests before modern specialized themes. Perfect for vintage collectors, hobby enthusiasts, and fans of LEGO's experimental early years.
descriptions.Holiday & Event: Celebrate year-round with LEGO® Holiday & Event minifigures! These seasonal sets commemorate Christmas, Halloween, Easter, Thanksgiving, Lunar New Year, and other celebrations worldwide. Collect Santa Claus in countless variants, Easter Bunnies, witches, pumpkin-headed figures, and festive characters. From Christmas workshops to Halloween scenes, these themed minifigures bring seasonal joy to LEGO collections. Holiday sets often include exclusive minifigures unavailable elsewhere, making them highly collectible. Cultural celebrations receive representation, from Chinese New Year traditions to winter festivals. These figures help families build holiday traditions and seasonal decorations. With gift-giving themes and festive accessories, Holiday & Event minifigures spread joy throughout the calendar. Perfect for collectors who love seasonal displays and families building year-round traditions with LEGO.
descriptions.Homemaker: LEGO® Homemaker (1971-1982): Frühe LEGO-Häuser und Möbel! Wohnzimmer, Küchen, Schlafzimmer mit Minifiguren-Vorläufern. Vintage-Innenarchitektur. Perfekt für klassische LEGO!
descriptions.Horizon: Hunt mechanical beasts in a post-apocalyptic world with LEGO® Horizon™ minifigures! Based on PlayStation's acclaimed video game series, collect Aloy and other tribal hunters from Horizon Forbidden West and LEGO Horizon Adventures. These minifigures feature detailed tribal gear, weapons, and accessories from the games' unique blend of primitive culture and advanced technology. Face mechanical dinosaurs and uncover ancient secrets in a far-future Earth. With stunning visual designs and epic adventures, Horizon brings PlayStation gaming to LEGO building. Perfect for gamers who love exploration, robot dinosaurs, and post-apocalyptic worlds where nature and technology collide in spectacular fashion.
descriptions.IKEA: Build Swedish design with LEGO® IKEA collaboration sets! These special releases combined IKEA's minimalist aesthetic with LEGO building. From storage solutions with buildable elements to furniture-inspired builds, the IKEA partnership explored home design through bricks. Perfect for design enthusiasts, IKEA fans, and collectors of brand collaboration sets.
descriptions.Indiana Jones: It belongs in a museum! LEGO® Indiana Jones mit Indy, Marion, Short Round auf der Jagd nach verlorenen Artefakten. Kämpfen Sie gegen Nazis und den Tempel des Todes. Perfekt für Abenteuer-Fans!
descriptions.Inventor: Innovate and create with LEGO® Inventor! This educational line teaches engineering principles through motorized building. Construct vehicles, machines, and contraptions that move, then learn the science behind how they work. Inventor bridges play and education, making STEM concepts tangible through building. Perfect for young engineers, students learning mechanics, and parents seeking educational building experiences.
descriptions.Island Xtreme Stunts: Extreme action awaits with LEGO® Island Xtreme Stunts minifigures! Based on the 2002 video game sequel to LEGO Island, this theme featured Pepper Roni and friends performing dangerous stunts for a movie production. Collect characters from LEGO Island including the Brickster, the skateboarding pizza delivery hero Pepper, and movie crew members. These sets combined action sports with movie-making themes, featuring ramps, vehicles, and stunt equipment. Island Xtreme Stunts represented LEGO's expansion into multimedia franchises connecting games with physical sets. Though brief, it delivered high-energy action and extreme sports excitement. Perfect for fans of the classic LEGO Island video games, nostalgic gamers, and collectors of LEGO's experimental multimedia themes from the early 2000s.
descriptions.Juniors: Build confidence with LEGO® Juniors! Designed for children ages 4-7, Juniors bridges DUPLO and System building with simplified sets featuring Quick Start elements. These sets include large foundation pieces that let young builders complete models quickly, building confidence while teaching System building techniques. From superhero adventures to city scenes, Juniors delivers age-appropriate building success. Perfect for kindergarten builders transitioning to regular LEGO and parents seeking confidence-building construction experiences.
descriptions.Jurassic World: Das Leben findet einen Weg mit LEGO® Jurassic World™ Minifiguren! Sammeln Sie furchtlose Dinosaurier-Trainer wie Owen Grady und Claire Dearing, während sie durch die gefährliche Welt prähistorischer Kreaturen navigieren. Von Park-Wissenschaftlern bis zu InGen-Personal umfasst unsere Jurassic World-Kollektion Charaktere aus allen sechs Filmen der Jurassic Park und Jurassic World Franchises. Während die Dinosaurier die Show stehlen, sind diese mutigen Minifiguren bereit, diese großartigen Kreaturen zu studieren, zu retten oder vor ihnen zu fliehen. Ob Sie die klassischen Jurassic Park-Tore nachbauen oder moderne Jurassic World-Abenteuer erschaffen - diese detaillierten Minifiguren bringen 65 Millionen Jahre Geschichte zum Leben. Perfekt für Dinosaurier-Enthusiasten und Action-Abenteuer-Fans jeden Alters.
descriptions.LEGENDS OF CHIMA: Enter the mystical animal kingdom with LEGO® LEGENDS OF CHIMA™ minifigures! In this fantastical world, anthropomorphic animals battle for control of the powerful CHI energy. Collect warriors from noble tribes like the Lions led by Laval, Crocodiles under Cragger, Eagles with Eris, Wolves with Worriz, Ravens, Gorillas, and Bears. Face sinister villains from the Ice Tribes and legendary creatures. Each minifigure features incredible detail with animal heads, armor, weapons, and tribal markings. With complex alliances, betrayals, and epic battles, Chima delivers rich storytelling and stunning character designs. Perfect for fans of fantasy, animals, and action-packed adventures in a unique LEGO universe.
descriptions.LEGO Brand: Celebrate LEGO itself with LEGO® Brand minifigures! These meta sets and figures celebrate the LEGO company, its history, stores, and brand identity. From LEGO Store employee figures to brand ambassadors, LEGO Brand minifigures represent the company's self-referential products. Collect promotional store figures, anniversary celebration characters, and corporate mascots. These figures often appear in LEGO Store grand openings, brand events, and corporate materials. Some celebrate LEGO milestones like anniversaries or achievements. LEGO Brand figures acknowledge that LEGO itself has become a beloved icon worthy of celebration. From classic logo designs to modern branding, these figures tell LEGO's story. Perfect for ultimate fans who love LEGO not just as a toy but as a cultural institution and brand with rich history.
descriptions.LEGO Ideas (CUUSOO): Fan creativity becomes reality with LEGO® Ideas minifigures! Formerly CUUSOO, this platform lets fans submit designs that the community votes on. Successful projects reaching 10,000 supporters are reviewed for production. Ideas sets span incredible diversity - from NASA Apollo Saturn V to The Big Bang Theory apartment, from Beatles Yellow Submarine to working typewriters. Minifigures reflect this range, featuring real people (scientists, musicians), fictional characters, and historical figures. Each Ideas set represents a fan's dream becoming official LEGO. With community-driven selection and limited production, these figures celebrate fan passion. Perfect for collectors who appreciate fan creativity, unique builds, and supporting fellow enthusiasts' visions becoming real LEGO products that anyone can build.
descriptions.LEGO Originals: Celebrate LEGO culture with LEGO® Originals! This lifestyle brand extends LEGO beyond building into clothing, accessories, and collectibles celebrating LEGO heritage. From vintage-inspired merchandise to cultural collaborations, LEGO Originals makes LEGO identity wearable. Perfect for LEGO fans seeking branded lifestyle products and collectors who love LEGO culture beyond bricks.
descriptions.LEGOLAND: Experience the parks at home with LEGO® LEGOLAND minifigures! These sets recreate rides, attractions, and experiences from LEGOLAND theme parks worldwide. Collect park visitors, ride operators, and mascots from LEGO's real-world destinations. From roller coasters to miniland displays, these sets bring theme park magic home. LEGOLAND figures often include exclusive variants sold only at park locations. With park maps, attractions, and iconic structures, these sets celebrate LEGO's physical presence worldwide. Some sets recreate specific park areas or attractions, letting fans relive vacation memories. Perfect for families who visited LEGOLAND parks, enthusiasts collecting park exclusives, and builders who want to recreate theme park excitement in brick form at home.
descriptions.LEGOLAND Parks: Adventure awaits at LEGOLAND® Parks with exclusive minifigures available only at theme park locations! These special figures commemorate visits to LEGOLAND parks across the globe - from California to Florida, Windsor to Billund, Dubai to Japan. Park-exclusive minifigures feature unique designs, often incorporating park logos, landmarks, or regional themes. Collect mascots, ride operators, and special edition figures unavailable anywhere else. LEGOLAND Parks minifigures become travel souvenirs and prove you visited specific locations. With limited availability and regional exclusivity, they're highly sought by collectors. These figures celebrate the real-world places where LEGO imagination comes to life. Perfect for park visitors wanting mementos, collectors hunting rare exclusives, and fans of LEGO's theme park legacy spanning decades.
descriptions.Lightyear: To infinity and beyond with LEGO® Lightyear™ minifigures! Based on the Pixar film exploring Buzz Lightyear's origin story, collect Space Ranger Buzz, his team, and the menacing Zurg. These minifigures feature sci-fi space suits, advanced technology, and futuristic designs. While inspired by Toy Story's Buzz, Lightyear tells the real story of the space hero. Build starships, explore alien planets, and battle robots in epic space adventures. Though a standalone Pixar film, these figures connect to the beloved Toy Story universe. Perfect for Pixar fans who want to explore the heroic origins of everyone's favorite Space Ranger.
descriptions.MINDSTORMS: Program the future with LEGO® MINDSTORMS! This revolutionary robotics platform combines LEGO building with advanced programming, letting you construct and code sophisticated robots. From remote-controlled vehicles to autonomous problem-solvers, MINDSTORMS makes engineering and computer science tangible. With sensors, motors, and unlimited building possibilities, MINDSTORMS has educated millions in robotics since 1998. Perfect for students learning programming, educators teaching STEM, robotics competitors, and anyone fascinated by bringing LEGO creations to life through code.
descriptions.MIXELS: Mix and combine with LEGO® MIXELS! This quirky theme featured small, colorful creatures from different tribes that could combine into larger 'Maxes' or even 'Murps'. Based on a Cartoon Network series, MIXELS delivered affordable, creative builds with personality. Each series introduced new tribes with unique characteristics and combination possibilities. Perfect for children who love combining builds, collectors of complete series, and budget-conscious builders seeking fun, creative sets.
descriptions.Master Builder Academy: Learn advanced techniques with LEGO® Master Builder Academy minifigures! This subscription-based program (2011-2013) taught sophisticated building skills through monthly kits. Each level introduced professional building techniques used by official LEGO designers. Accompanying minifigures represented instructors and characters guiding builders through increasingly complex projects. Master Builder Academy emphasized education through structured curriculum, graduating students through different achievement levels. From architecture to mechanical engineering, these sets taught real skills. Though discontinued, Master Builder Academy represented premium educational LEGO content for serious builders. These figures came with designer secrets and insider building tips. Perfect for adult builders seeking mastery, LEGO enthusiasts wanting professional techniques, and collectors of educational LEGO history.
descriptions.Minecraft: Bauen, craften und erkunden Sie die blockige Welt von Minecraft® mit LEGO® Minifiguren! Von Steve und Alex bis zu Zombies, Creepern und Endermen bringen Sie Ihre Lieblings-Minecraft-Charaktere in die reale Welt. Sammeln Sie Dorfbewohner, Piglins, Skelette und alle Mobs, die Minecraft-Abenteuer unvergesslich machen. Unsere Minecraft-Minifiguren verfügen über das gleiche kubische Design wie das Spiel und erfassen perfekt die ikonische blockige Ästhetik, während sie LEGO-Baumöglichkeiten hinzufügen. Bekämpfen Sie den Enderdrachen, erkunden Sie den Nether, oder bauen Sie Ihre Traumbasis mit diesen detaillierten Charakterfiguren. Perfekt für Minecraft-Spieler, die ihre digitalen Abenteuer in physische Bauerlebnisse bringen möchten und zwei geliebte Welten der Kreativität und Fantasie kombinieren.
descriptions.Minitalia: Discover Italian LEGO history with Minitalia! This vintage line was exclusive to the Italian market, featuring unique builds and packaging. Minitalia sets represent regional LEGO variations and the company's international market strategies. Perfect for international LEGO historians, Italian collectors, and fans of regional LEGO exclusives.
descriptions.Model Team: Build realistic scale models with LEGO® Model Team! This advanced line featured true-to-life vehicles with working functions, opening doors, and authentic details. From trucks and airplanes to construction equipment, Model Team sets targeted adult builders seeking display-quality replicas. With complex building techniques and impressive final models, Model Team represented peak 1990s LEGO sophistication. Perfect for vehicle enthusiasts, adult collectors, and builders who love realistic, functional models.
descriptions.Modulex: Professional building with LEGO® Modulex! This architectural planning system used smaller-scale bricks for professional architectural models and urban planning. Used by architects and developers, Modulex represented LEGO in professional design contexts. Though discontinued, Modulex showed LEGO's application beyond toys. Perfect for LEGO historians, architectural model enthusiasts, and collectors of specialized LEGO systems.
descriptions.Monkie Kid: Legendary! LEGO® Monkie Kid Minifiguren bringen die chinesische Mythologie zum Leben, inspiriert von der klassischen Geschichte 'Journey to the West'! Folgen Sie MK (Monkie Kid), einem Nudellieferanten, der die magische Stab von Sun Wukong (dem Monkey King) erbt und zum Helden wird. Das Team umfasst: MK mit seinem goldenen Stab, Mei (Dragon Girl mit Motorrad), Tang (Gelehrter und Mythologie-Experte), Pigsy (MK's Boss, Noodle-Shop-Besitzer), Sandy (sanftmütiger Riese mit Kampfkunst-Fähigkeiten) und Monkey King selbst! Kämpfen Sie gegen dämonische Feinde: Spider Queen mit ihrer Arachnoid-Armee, Demon Bull King und Princess Iron Fan mit ihren mechanischen Bullen, Macaque (böser Affe-Klon) und die mächtige Lady Bone Demon. Monkie Kid-Sets enthalten atemberaubende chinesische Architektur, mythische Kreaturen (Drachen, Löwen) und aufwendige Golden Details. Jede Figur hat einzigartige asiatisch-inspirierte Designs, detaillierte Prints und authentische kulturelle Elemente. Perfekt für Mythologie-Fans, Action-Enthusiasten und Kultur-Sammler!
descriptions.Monster Fighters: The monsters are coming! Jäger gegen Universal Monsters. Dr. Rathbone und Team bekämpfen Lord Vampyre, Zombies und Werwölfe in Gothic-Horror-Settings. Perfekt für Horror-Fans!
descriptions.Muji: Minimalist building with LEGO® MUJI collaboration! These special sets combined MUJI's Japanese design philosophy with LEGO building. Featuring clean lines, simple designs, and understated aesthetics, MUJI sets celebrated minimalism through bricks. Perfect for design enthusiasts, MUJI fans, and collectors of Japan-exclusive LEGO collaborations.
descriptions.NEXO KNIGHTS: Download hero powers with LEGO® NEXO KNIGHTS™ minifigures! This futuristic medieval theme (2016-2018) combined knights with digital technology. Collect Clay Moorington, Lance Richmond, Aaron Fox, Macy Halbert, and Axl as they defend the kingdom of Knighton from Jestro and his Book of Monsters. These minifigures featured detailed armor, shields with scannable NEXO Powers, and modern-medieval designs. Battle lava monsters, stone monsters, and digital villains with downloadable abilities via the NEXO KNIGHTS app. Blending fantasy, technology, and gaming, this theme pushed LEGO innovation. Perfect for fans who love knights, robots, and the fusion of medieval valor with futuristic technology.
descriptions.NINJAGO: Master the art of Spinjitzu with LEGO® NINJAGO® minifigures! Join Kai, Jay, Cole, Zane, Lloyd, and Nya as they battle against the forces of evil threatening Ninjago City. From classic ninja training robes to advanced techno suits, collect dozens of variants for each ninja as they evolve through multiple seasons of adventures. Face legendary villains like Lord Garmadon, the Serpentine tribes, the Overlord, and the Skulkin army. Our NINJAGO collection includes minifigures from all seasons of the hit TV show, The LEGO NINJAGO Movie, and exclusive tournament fighters. With elemental powers, ancient weapons, and modern vehicles, these ninjas are ready for any battle. Perfect for fans who want to recreate epic showdowns or create their own Spinjitzu adventures.
descriptions.Nike: Just build it with LEGO® Nike minifigures! This unique collaboration combined the world's leading athletic brand with LEGO. Though limited, Nike-themed sets and minifigures celebrated sports, athletics, and the iconic swoosh logo. These rare promotional figures often appeared in special retail partnerships or limited releases. Representing the intersection of sports culture and building toys, Nike collaborations targeted collectors and brand enthusiasts. With athletic gear, sporting equipment, and Nike branding, these figures merged two iconic brands. Such corporate collaborations remain unusual in LEGO history, making Nike figures especially collectible. Perfect for sneaker collectors, sports fans, brand collaboration enthusiasts, and anyone appreciating when two cultural icons unite for unique merchandise.
descriptions.Ninja: Master stealth and combat with LEGO® Ninja minifigures! Separate from NINJAGO, this classic theme featured traditional ninja warriors in black outfits with martial arts weapons. From the 1990s and 2000s, these sets depicted historical Japanese ninja castles, training grounds, and battles. Collect ninja warriors, samurai, and feudal Japanese characters with authentic weapons like katanas, shurikens, and staffs. These figures emphasized historical accuracy over fantasy elements. From castles to dojos, Ninja sets delivered martial arts action. Though overshadowed by NINJAGO's popularity, classic Ninja remains beloved by collectors. These figures represented LEGO's interpretation of Japanese warrior culture. Perfect for martial arts enthusiasts, fans of historical themes, and collectors appreciating LEGO's take on legendary stealth warriors.
descriptions.One Piece: Set sail for the Grand Line with LEGO® One Piece™ minifigures! Join Monkey D. Luffy and the Straw Hat Pirates on their quest to find the legendary treasure. Collect Luffy, Zoro, Nami, Sanji, Chopper, Robin, Franky, Brook, and Jinbe, each with signature abilities and personality. These minifigures bring Eiichiro Oda's beloved manga and anime to LEGO with distinctive character designs, pirate ships, and adventures. From Devil Fruit powers to sword techniques, recreate epic battles and emotional moments from one of the world's best-selling manga series. Perfect for anime fans who dream of adventure, treasure, and the power of friendship on the high seas.
descriptions.Overwatch: Heroes never die! LEGO® Overwatch mit Tracer, Widowmaker, Soldier 76, Hanzo, D.Va und mehr. Blizzard's FPS-Helden in LEGO-Form. Perfekt für Gamer!
descriptions.Pharaoh's Quest: Uncover ancient secrets! Abenteurer stoppen den bösen Pharao Amset-Ra in Ägypten. Mumien, Anubis-Wächter und Pyramiden-Schätze. Perfekt für Ägypten-Fans!
descriptions.Pirates: Yo-ho-ho! Willkommen an Bord mit LEGO® Pirates Minifiguren – Abenteuer auf hoher See seit 1989! Segeln Sie mit mutigen Freibeutern, königlichen Soldaten (Bluecoats/Redcoats) und mysteriösen Inselbewohnern. Die klassische Pirates-Ära (1989-1997) brachte ikonische Charaktere hervor: Captain Redbeard, Governor Broadside, Pirate-Kapitäne mit Holzbeinen und Augenklappen, Schiffsmaten mit Papageien und Schatzsucher. Entdecken Sie die verschiedenen Fraktionen: Imperial Guards (britische Soldaten in roten Uniformen), Bluecoat Soldiers (spanische Marine), Islander Natives mit Tiki-Masken und die gefürchteten Piraten-Crews. Jede Figur kommt mit authentischen Accessoires: Säbel, Pistolen, Schatzkarten, Rum-Flaschen, Kanonen und Totenkopfflaggen. Die Pirates-of-the-Caribbean-Kollaboration brachte Jack Sparrow, Davy Jones, Barbossa und mehr. Perfekt für Abenteurer, Schatzjäger und Seefahrer!
descriptions.Pirates of the Caribbean: Tote Männer erzählen keine Geschichten mit LEGO® Pirates of the Caribbean™ Minifiguren! Basierend auf Disneys Blockbuster-Filmreihe segeln Sie mit Captain Jack Sparrow, Will Turner, Elizabeth Swann und Captain Barbossa. Bekämpfen Sie Davy Jones und seine verfluchte Crew an Bord der Flying Dutchman oder suchen Sie nach Schätzen mit Jacks charakteristischer Art. Diese Minifiguren erfassen die Filmcharaktere mit unglaublichem Detail - von Jacks Dreadlocks und Eyeliner bis zu Davy Jones' Oktopus-Tentakeln. Bauen Sie ikonische Schiffe wie die Black Pearl und stellen Sie Schwertkämpfe, übernatürliche Flüche und Piraten-Abenteuer nach. Mit Nebencharakteren und mythischen Kreaturen aus allen Filmen der Reihe bringen diese Figuren Disneys Piratenwelt zum Leben. Perfekt für Fans der Filme, Piraten-Enthusiasten und Sammler, die detaillierte lizenzierte Charaktere lieben.
descriptions.Pokémon: Catch 'em all with LEGO® Pokémon™ sets! Build your favorite Pokémon characters, trainers, and battle scenes from the beloved franchise. From Pikachu to legendary Pokémon, these sets bring the world of Pokémon adventures into LEGO form. Perfect for Pokémon fans, Nintendo collectors, and builders who grew up catching Pokémon.
descriptions.Power Functions: Motorize your builds with LEGO® Power Functions! This electrical system includes motors, battery boxes, lights, and controllers that bring static models to life. Add movement to vehicles, activate mechanisms in buildings, and create remote-controlled creations. Power Functions transformed LEGO from static building to dynamic engineering. Perfect for builders adding motion to models, engineers exploring mechanics, and creators who want their builds to move.
descriptions.Power Miners: Dig deep! Bergleute sammeln Energiekristalle und bekämpfen Rock Monsters unter der Erde. Gigantische Bohrfahrzeuge und Lava-Höhlen. Perfekt für Bergbau-Fans!
descriptions.Primo: LEGO® Primo (1996-2006): Baby-LEGO für 6-24 Monate! Rattle-Steine, Beißringe und weiche Plüsch-Elemente. Ersetzt durch DUPLO Baby. Perfekt für Babys!
descriptions.Prince of Persia: LEGO® Prince of Persia basierend auf dem Film. Dastan, Prinzessin Tamina und der Dolch der Zeit in persischen Palästen. Perfekt für Action-Abenteuer-Fans!
descriptions.Project Hail Mary: Science saves humanity with LEGO® Project Hail Mary minifigures! Based on Andy Weir's science fiction novel, follow lone astronaut Ryder Grace on his desperate mission to save Earth. This LEGO Ideas set celebrates hard science fiction with detailed minifigures and scientific accuracy. From space travel to alien encounters, Project Hail Mary combines survival story with genuine scientific problem-solving. These minifigures represent characters from the book's gripping narrative about sacrifice, ingenuity, and interstellar friendship. With spacecraft and scientific equipment, recreate humanity's last hope against extinction. Perfect for fans of The Martian author Andy Weir, hard science fiction enthusiasts, and readers who love stories where intelligence and perseverance overcome impossible odds in realistic space exploration.
descriptions.Promotional: LEGO® Promotional: Exklusive Werbegeschenk-Sets! Store-Promos, Event-Exclusives, Polybags und limitierte Minifiguren. Sammler-Schätze. Perfekt für Promo-Jäger!
descriptions.Quatro: LEGO® Quatro (2004-2006): Übergroße Bausteine für 1-3 Jahre! Doppelt so groß wie DUPLO, vierfach größer als System-Steine. Sicher für Kleinkinder. Perfekt für die Kleinsten!
descriptions.Queer Eye: Can you believe? LEGO® Queer Eye™ minifigures bring the Fab Five to brick form! Based on Netflix's beloved makeover show, collect Jonathan Van Ness, Tan France, Antoni Porowski, Bobby Berk, and Karamo Brown. This LEGO Ideas set celebrates positivity, self-care, and transformative kindness. Each minifigure captures the hosts' distinctive styles and personalities, from Jonathan's flowing hair to Tan's fashion expertise. Build the loft where transformations happen and recreate emotional makeovers that changed lives. With representation and inclusivity, Queer Eye minifigures celebrate being yourself. This set honors the show's message that everyone deserves to feel confident and loved. Perfect for fans of the show who believe in kindness, self-improvement, and celebrating what makes everyone unique and beautiful.
descriptions.Racers: LEGO® Racers: High-Speed Rennwagen, Motorräder und Stunt-Fahrzeuge! Ferrari, Williams F1 und Desert-Racers. Speed und Action seit 2001. Perfekt für Speed-Fans!
descriptions.Rock Raiders: LEGO® Rock Raiders (1999-2000): Bergleute gestrandet auf fremdem Planeten sammeln Energiekristalle! Bohrfahrzeuge, Monster und unterirdische Höhlen. Perfekt für Sci-Fi-Bergbau-Fans!
descriptions.SPEED CHAMPIONS: Experience motorsport excellence with LEGO® SPEED CHAMPIONS minifigures! This theme delivers authentic racing with officially licensed vehicles from Ferrari, Porsche, McLaren, Lamborghini, Ford, and more. Collect professional race car drivers, pit crew members, and mechanics wearing real team colors and sponsor logos. SPEED CHAMPIONS features accurate racing suits, helmets, and equipment reflecting real motorsport teams. From Formula 1 to endurance racing, from classic cars to modern supercars, these sets celebrate automotive excellence. With detailed driver figures matching real race vehicles, fans can recreate historic races and legendary moments. The theme appeals to adult car enthusiasts with sophisticated building and authentic branding. Perfect for motorsport fans, car collectors, and anyone who loves the engineering and excitement of professional racing.
descriptions.Samsonite: Discover LEGO history with Samsonite LEGO®! From 1964-1988, Samsonite manufactured LEGO sets for North American markets. These vintage sets featured unique packaging and sometimes different set numbers from European releases. Samsonite LEGO represents important company history and regional variations. Perfect for vintage collectors, LEGO historians, and fans of classic building sets from LEGO's growth era.
descriptions.Scala: LEGO® Scala (1979-1980, 1997-2001): Fashion-fokussierte Sets für Mädchen! Puppenhaus-ähnliche Figuren mit Mode, Schmuck und Wohnräumen. Perfekt für Mode-Fans!
descriptions.School Supplies: Get organized with LEGO® School Supplies! While not a traditional theme, this category includes functional school products featuring LEGO design - from pencil cases to lunchboxes, backpacks to stationery. Some products include exclusive minifigures or mini-builds. These collectibles merge practicality with LEGO fandom, letting students bring their passion to school. From erasers shaped like bricks to notebooks featuring classic minifigure designs, School Supplies keeps LEGO part of daily life. Licensed school supplies often include theme-specific designs from Star Wars to NINJAGO. Though primarily merchandise, exclusive minifigures packaged with school products become collectible. Perfect for students showing LEGO pride at school and collectors hunting minifigures in unexpected places.
descriptions.Scooby-Doo: Zoinks! LEGO® Scooby-Doo bringt Mystery Inc. in LEGO-Form! Scooby, Shaggy, Fred, Daphne und Velma lösen Mysterien. Bauen Sie das Mystery Machine und jagen Sie Schurken mit abnehmbaren Masken. Perfekt für Mystery-Solver!
descriptions.Sculptures: Create art with LEGO® Sculptures! This advanced theme features large-scale, museum-quality builds of animals, objects, and artistic subjects. From life-size dinosaurs to iconic symbols, Sculptures push LEGO building into fine art territory. These impressive models serve as showpieces, conversation starters, and demonstrations of LEGO's artistic potential. Perfect for adult builders, art enthusiasts, and those seeking statement pieces that showcase LEGO craftsmanship.
descriptions.Service Packs: LEGO® Service Packs: Ersatzteile und spezielle Komponenten! Ersatz-Steine, Räder, Fenster und seltene Elemente. Offizieller LEGO-Service. Perfekt für Reparaturen!
descriptions.Sonic the Hedgehog: Gotta go fast with LEGO® Sonic the Hedgehog™ minifigures! Speed through Green Hill Zone with Sonic, Tails, Amy Rose, and their friends as they battle the evil Dr. Eggman and his robot army. Collect iconic characters from SEGA's legendary franchise, including fan favorites and fearsome badniks like Buzz Bomber, Crabmeat, and Newtron. These minifigures capture the vibrant energy and attitude that made Sonic a gaming icon since 1991. From loop-de-loops to chaos emeralds, bring the high-speed action of Sonic games into your LEGO world. Perfect for retro gamers and new fans alike who love adventure, speed, and classic platforming action with attitude.
descriptions.Space: 3... 2... 1... Liftoff! Entdecken Sie LEGO® Space Minifiguren – eine der ikonischsten und am längsten laufenden LEGO-Themen seit 1978! Von den klassischen Blue/Red/Yellow Classic Space Astronauten über Blacktron-Weltraumpiraten bis zu Futuron-Explorern und M-Tron Miners hat Space Generationen inspiriert. Entdecken Sie legendäre Fraktionen: Classic Space (1978-1987) mit ikonischen Astronauten, Blacktron I & II (die bösen Weltraumschurken), Space Police I, II & III (intergalaktische Gesetzeshüter), Ice Planet 2002 (Orange Transparente Kettensägen!), Exploriens, Insectoids, UFO und Mars Mission. Jede Fraktion hat einzigartige Farben, Logos und Ausrüstung – von Jetpacks über Laserpistolen bis zu Alien-Technologie. Sammeln Sie mutige Astronauten, außerirdische Lebensformen, Roboterbegleiter und Weltraumkrieger. Perfekt für Sci-Fi-Fans, Weltraumforscher und Retro-LEGO-Liebhaber!
descriptions.Speed Racer: Go Speed Racer, go! LEGO® Speed Racer™ minifigures bring the classic anime to brick form! Based on the 2008 film adaptation of the legendary Japanese series, collect Speed Racer, Racer X, Trixie, and the rest of the racing crew. These minifigures came with the iconic Mach 5 and other colorful racing vehicles from the visually stunning movie.
